atomic_response.coefficient_status: ideal atomic-response coefficient for the fully spin-polarised 166Er reference state probed along the quantisation axis; apparatus-level response remains to be calibrated

caption: 15-frame DPFI sequences at |Delta|/2pi=1.5 GHz for A, B and C (F=90, 150 and 300 mW us). Each tile shows one fixed-noise realisation of the signed signal S=(I_H-I_V)/(I_H+I_V). Row labels report N_use and N_dep. Orange marks SNR failure, red marks depletion above 30%, and striped bands mark simultaneous failure. Frames beyond the first failed criterion remain visible but are excluded from N_use.

criteria.status_encoding: orange marks image-quality failure only, red marks depletion failure only, and alternating red-orange diagonal stripes mark simultaneous failure of both criteria

label: figure_5_4_dual_port_multiframe_filmstrip_orca_fusion_m10_v4

provenance_correction.retrospective_source_snapshot_status: post-generation preserved source/config snapshot; not a clean-generation claim

scope.continuation: all 15 frames are rendered from the continued model state; frames beyond either screening limit are shown but are not counted as usable
scope.detector: ORCA-Fusion Ultra quiet scenario with 0.7 e- rms read noise per pixel and port
scope.purpose: show how the single-frame quality and sequence-length results of Figures 5.1-5.3 appear in complete multiframe camera sequences
scope.state_model: Version 1 heating plus initial-density reabsorption with 2 E_rec per scattering cycle
